game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Everdell** Everdell is a turn-based digital board game adaptation combining worker placement and strategic card play over four distinct seasons. Players take one of three actions per turn: placing a worker on a designated valley space to collect specific resources like 2 berries or 1 twig, playing a Construction or Critter card from their hand into their city tableau (up to 15 cards total) by spending required resources, or preparing for the next season, which recalls all placed workers and advances the game state. Cards played into the city provide ongoing resource generation, unique abilities, and end-game victory points, with players aiming to discover powerful card synergies to maximize their score. The game progresses through Spring, Summer, Autumn, and Winter, with each season potentially granting additional workers or bonus actions, and the player with the highest total victory points after the fourth season concludes is declared the winner.
game_info.description: Build your woodland city across four seasons in this strategic card game! Collect resources (berries, twigs, resin, pebbles) by placing workers on action spaces, then use those resources to construct buildings and recruit critters. Each card you play grants unique abilities and victory points. Manage your limited city space (15 cards max) and workers carefully to create powerful synergies. The player with the most victory points after Winter wins!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between available actions and cards
Space: Confirm selection / Take action
Z: Cancel current selection / Go back
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic gameplay mechanics test. Validates that the game can place workers, collect resources, play cards, and transition between seasons without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Take random valid actions including placing workers on resource spaces, playing affordable cards into the city, and preparing for next season when no other actions are available.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Game progresses through all four seasons without crashes. Resources are collected, cards are played, and the game reaches GAME_OVER state with a valid final score.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal strategy to win the game. Tests card synergies, efficient resource management, and victory point maximization across all seasons.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritize high-value cards and resource production buildings early. Build engine with cards that generate resources automatically. Focus on card combinations that provide bonus victory points. Efficiently manage workers and city space to maximize scoring potential.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieves high victory point total (60+) by end of Winter season. Demonstrates effective card synergies and resource management. Game ends in GAME_OVER_WIN state with optimal scoring strategy validated.
